mapper.sql: id, station_id, port_number, occupancy_status, vehicle_plate, start_time, end_time, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM station_occupancy WHERE station_id = #{stationId} ORDER BY port_number
SELECT FROM station_occupancy WHERE station_id = #{stationId} AND occupancy_status = 1 ORDER BY port_number
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO station_occupancy (station_id, port_number, occupancy_status, vehicle_plate, start_time, end_time, create_time) VALUES (#{stationId}, #{portNumber}, #{occupancyStatus}, #{vehiclePlate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, NOW())
